title: Dileu’r ymateb
applicationTitle: Dileu’r cyfan neu ran o’r ymateb
genericGuidanceRep: [W]Upload letters, photos or documents if they are relevant to the claimant’s application. Do not upload any other material.
contactApplicationTextRep: [W]Give details of the claimant’s application in the text box or upload a file

content.text: Gallwch ofyn i’r tribiwnlys ddileu’r cyfan neu rannau o’r ymateb.
Os yw rhywbeth yn cael ei ‘ddileu’ mae'n cael ei dynnu oddi ar yr hawliad neu'r ymateb ac ni ellir dibynnu arno.
Gall y tribiwnlys ddileu’r cyfan neu rannau o ymateb y parti arall o’i wirfodd ei hun neu yn dilyn cais gan yr hawlydd.
Rhaid i gais am ddiddymiad fod yn seiliedig ar o leiaf un o agweddau Rheol 38 Rheolau Trefniadaeth y Tribiwnlysoedd Cyflogaeth, sef pan:

items: mae’r ymateb yn dramgwyddus, yn flinderus neu nid oes siawns rhesymol y bydd yn llwyddiannus
cynhaliwyd yr achos mewn ffordd sy’n
dramgwyddus, yn afresymol neu’n flinderus nid yw’r atebydd wedi cydymffurfio â gorchmynion y tribiwnlys na’r Rheolau Trefniadaeth
nid yw’r ymateb wedi’i ddilyn mewn modd gweithredol
nid yw’n bosib cael gwrandawiad teg bellach

content.text: Manylion i’w cynnwys yn eich cais:

items: pam ydych chi’n credu y dylid dileu’r ymateb
pa sail neu seiliau yn Rheol 38 ydych chi’n credu sy’n berthnasol yn eich achos chi
os ydych yn cyfeirio at bwyntiau neu baragraffau wedi’u rhifo mewn ymateb y parti arall, dylech gynnwys y rhifau hyn neu gyfeiriadau eraill

contentRep.text: [W]The claimant can request that the tribunal strike out all or parts of the response.
[W]If something is ‘struck out’ it is removed from the claim or response and cannot be relied upon.
[W]The tribunal can strike out all or parts of the other party's response on their own initiative or after a request from the claimant.
[W]A strike out request must be based on at least one of the grounds of Rule 38 of the Employment Tribunals Rules of Procedure, which is when:

items: [W]the response is scandalous, vexatious or has no reasonable prospect of success
[W]the proceedings have been conducted in a way that is scandalous, unreasonable or vexatious
[W]the other party has not complied with tribunal orders or the Rules of Procedure
[W]the response has not been actively pursued
[W]it is no longer possible to have a fair hearing
[W]why the claimant thinks the response should be struck out
[W]which ground or grounds in Rule 38 you say applies in the case
[W]if you are referring to numbered points or paragraphs in a respondent's response, include these numbers or other references
